metadata.name: ambient-docker-swarm-plugin
metadata.summary: An AmbientEdgeServer plugin for managing docker swarms

classes.name: docker_swarm_plugin.models.service_models.SyncSurveyReport

class_variables.name: docker_swarm_plugin.models.service_models.SyncSurveyReport.networks_in_sync
documentation: TODO: Implement network comparison

For all properties, True means the property is in sync,
False means it is not in sync

methods.name: docker_swarm_plugin.main.DockerSwarmPlugin.handle_event
documentation:
Handle incoming messages

Args:
    message (Message): Incoming message

Returns:
    None

methods.name: docker_swarm_plugin.main.DockerSwarmPlugin.handle_cluster_event
documentation:
Handle cluster event

Args:
    message (Message): Incoming message

Returns:
    None

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.cluster_config_service.handle_cluster_should_not_exist
documentation: handle cluster should not exist

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.create_local_service
documentation: Create a local service from the backend service.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.get_local_service
documentation: Get a local service from the given Docker client.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.update_local_service
documentation: Update a local service from the backend service.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.build_endpoint_spec
documentation: Build enpoint spec for creating a service locally

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.enforce_requested_spec
documentation: Enforce the requested spec on the local service.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.get_service_node_relationship
documentation: Get the service node relationship.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.get_service_cached
documentation: Get the service from the cache.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.find_matching_local_service
documentation: Find the matching local service.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.gather_local_services
documentation:
Gather the current services from the given Docker client.

Args:
    client (docker.DockerClient): The Docker client to use.

Returns:
    List[DockerServiceAttrs]: The list of current services.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.pair_services
documentation:
Pair the local services with the backend services.

Args:
    local_services (List[DockerServiceAttrs]): The local services.
    backend_services (List[ServiceNodeRelationship]): The backend
        service node relationships.

Returns:
    List[Pair]: The paired services.
        [
            (local_service, backend_service),
            (local_service, None),
            (None, backend_service),
            ...
        ]

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.group_services
documentation:
Group the pairs of services by their name.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The pairs of services.

Returns:
    Dict[str, List[Pair]]: The grouped pairs.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.handle_paired
documentation:
Handle the paired services.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The paired services.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.determine_in_sync
documentation:
Determine if the local service matches the backend service

Args:
    local_service (DockerServiceAttrs): local service
    backend_service (ServiceNodeRelationship): backend service node relationship

Returns:
    bool: True if the services match, False otherwise

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.handle_paired_mismatched
documentation:
Handle the paired mismatched services.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The paired mismatched services.
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.
    node_id (str): The ID of the node.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.handle_out_of_sync_services
documentation:
Handle the out of sync services.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The out of sync services.
    base_url (str): The base URL
    token (str): The token to use
    node_id (int): The ID of the node

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.handle_paired_and_in_sync
documentation:
Handle the in-sync services.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The in-sync services.
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.handle_local_only
documentation:
Handle the local only services.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The local only services.
    node_id (int): The ID of the node.
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.handle_backend_only
documentation:
Handle the backend only services.

Args:
    pairs (List[Pair]): The backend only services.
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.update_service
documentation:
Update the service with the given ID.

Args:
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.
    service_id (int): The ID of the service to update.
    **values: The values to update.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.create_service
documentation:
Create a service with the given request.

Args:
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.
    service_request (ServiceCreate): The service request.

functions.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.update_service_node_relationship
documentation:
Update the service node relationship with the given request.

Args:
    base_url (str): The base URL of the API.
    token (str): The token to use.
    service_node_relationship (ServiceNodeRelationship): The service
        node relationship.

methods.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.ServiceConfigSvc.run_system_sweep
documentation:
Run a system sweep on the given node.
Running a system sweep in this context is to
check the current status of services on the node
and update the status of the services via the API.

Args:
    node (Node): Node object.

methods.name: docker_swarm_plugin.services.service_config_service.ServiceConfigSvc.handle_service_event
documentation: Handle a service event.
